steps.title: Cancel the common factor
steps.content:
Notice that $(x+9)$ appears in both the numerator and denominator. For all $x \neq -9$, we can cancel this common factor:
$$\frac{(x+9)(x-9)}{x+9} = x - 9$$

steps.title: Solve the simplified equation
steps.content: The equation becomes $x - 9 = 7$. Adding 9 to both sides gives $x = 16$. That matches choice C — C is correct.
